prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PJEGFTSD-7PC-SML-SLVR-3 Product Type: WATCH Brand (from catalog): Jeweler's Tools Existing Title: 7pc Micro Precision Screwdriver Set 0.6mm - 1.6mm with Replacement Tips - Jewelry, Watch Repair, Electronics Description: This set of jewelers screw drivers includes 7 precision flat tips ranging from 0.6mm - 1.6mm with a different colored corresponding swivel top for easy reference of size.

This set is all flat tips with an extra reversible tip within the body of the handle. The screw chuck spins off to reveal the extra tip in each handle.

This is the ideal set for around the home, at the office, or just to have handy to tighten your eye glasses. Search Terms: screwdriver precision tools hobby eye glass repair Features: - Set of 7 Flat Tip Screw Drivers - Tip Sizes: 0.6mm, 0.7mm, 0.8mm, 1.0mm, 1.2mm, 1.5mm, 1.6mm - Stainless Steel - Screw-on Chuck - Replaceable Tips === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Jeweler's Tools 7-pc Micro Precision Screwdriver Set 0.6-1.6mm

openai.item_name: Jeweler's Tools 7-Pc Micro Precision Screwdriver Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Flat Tips 06Mm To 16Mm, Replaceable Tips, Stainless Steel, Watch And Jewelry Repair, Screw-on Chuck

openai.title_differentiation: 7 Flat Tip Drivers, 06Mm-16Mm, Stainless Steel, Screw On Chuck, Replaceable Tips, Jewelry Watch Eyeglass Repair
